ksa_text: Skill in establishing, maintaining, and utilizing data dictionaries and metadata repositories to document data characteristics, definitions, lineage, and governance context.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of how to extract, analyze, and use metadata.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of how to extract, analyze, and use metadata.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-006 (DQ, Skill) maps to Financial Risk Specialist scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4421 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.442, dcwf=0.429, nice=0.427. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4421 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DQ-S-006 (DQ, composite 0.4421) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles does not surface this DQ-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4421 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DQ domain content at composite 0.4421 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4421, domain DQ. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
